message:
fix(widgets): use saturating i32 casts in scroll page_up/page_down (bd-157gb)

Replace bare `as i32` casts from usize with `i32::try_from().unwrap_or(i32::MAX)`
in log_viewer scroll_up/scroll_down and virtualized page_up/page_down methods.
Prevents silent wrapping that could invert scroll direction for pathological inputs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-1f55v","title":"UI/Perf: status log panel spec + schema","description":"Goal
- Define the status log panel content, update cadence, and log schema fields used for display.

Deliverables
- List of log event types (render_start, render_done, layout_warning, fallback_used, error).
- Schema fields (timestamp, sample, mode, tier, timings, status, message).
- UI placement rules by size (only on 200x60 or when toggled).

Acceptance
- Status log panel is deterministic and testable; schema can be validated in e2e.

 {"id":"bd-1f8","title":"Implement color downgrade (TrueColor → 256 → 16 → mono)","description":"PHASE 4 - COLOR DOWNGRADE SYSTEM

## Background
Not all terminals support TrueColor. The color system must gracefully downgrade colors to match terminal capabilities while maintaining visual coherence.

## Technical Requirements

### Color Profiles (from capabilities)
pub enum ColorProfile {
    Mono,      // No color (dumb terminal)
    Ansi16,    // 16 colors (basic)
    Ansi256,   // 256 colors (xterm)
    TrueColor, // 24-bit RGB
}

### Downgrade Chain
TrueColor → 256 → 16 → Mono

### Algorithms

#### RGB to 256-color
fn rgb_to_256(r: u8, g: u8, b: u8) -> u8 {
    // Grayscale check first
    if r == g && g == b {
        if r < 8 { return 16; }
        if r > 248 { return 231; }
        return 232 + ((r - 8) / 10).min(23);
    }
    // 6×6×6 color cube
    let r6 = (r as u16 * 6 / 256) as u8;
    let g6 = (g as u16 * 6 / 256) as u8;
    let b6 = (b as u16 * 6 / 256) as u8;
    16 + 36 * r6 + 6 * g6 + b6
}

#### 256-color to 16-color
- Map cube colors to nearest ANSI color
- Preserve bright/normal distinction
- Use perceptual color distance (not Euclidean RGB)

#### 16-color to Mono
- Convert to brightness value
- Above threshold = white, below = black
- Optionally use bold for emphasis

### Caching
- Cache downgraded colors (LRU or hash)
- Profile is detected once at startup
- Colors resolved at render time

### Theme Integration
Themes should define colors at highest fidelity.
Presenter applies downgrade based on detected profile.

## Tests Required
- [ ] TrueColor passthrough works
- [ ] 256-color conversion accurate
- [ ] 16-color conversion visually reasonable
- [ ] Mono fallback works
- [ ] Grayscale optimization
- [ ] Cache hit rate acceptable
- [ ] Profile detection accurate

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All profiles supported
- [ ] Downgrade preserves intent
- [ ] No performance regression
- [ ] Theme colors degrade gracefully
- [ ] Works in tmux/screen

 {"id":"bd-1fd9","title":"Implement Session Recording Asciicast tests","description":"# Implement Session Recording Asciicast tests

## Background
Part of Session Recording to Asciicast Format (bd-3dca). Tests ensure asciicast export works.

## Unit Tests
- header_format_is_correct: Asciicast v2 header matches spec
- events_have_correct_timing: Timestamps are monotonically increasing
- output_bytes_encoded_correctly: UTF-8 and control sequences preserved
- file_is_valid_ndjson: Each line is valid JSON

## Integration Tests
- recorded_session_plays_in_asciinema: Export plays correctly in asciinema player
- recording_captures_full_session: All output from session captured
- large_session_export_works: Multi-hour sessions export without issues

## Property Tests
- timing_is_monotonic: Event times never decrease
- all_output_bytes_preserved: Input bytes == output bytes after decode

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests verify asciinema compatibility
- [ ] Property tests find no counterexamples","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:33:07.218010574Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T21:31:44.264866786Z","closed_at":"2026-02-01T21:31:44.264847930Z","close_reason":"Tests implemented in asciicast.rs as part of bd-3dca (20 unit tests + 3 doc tests)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1fd9","depends_on_id":"bd-3dca","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T14:32:17Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
